name: Malted Milk Cookies--Unknown Cookbook Version
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter with an electric mixer on medium to high speed for about 30 seconds or until softened.
2. Add the sugar, brown sugar, and baking soda. Beat until combined.
3. Beat in eggs, vanilla, and melted chocolate until combined.
4. Beat in as much of the flour as you can using the mixer.
5. Using a wooden spoon, stir in any remaining flour and the malted milk powder. Stir in malted milk balls.
6. Drop dough from a rounded teaspoon about 2 1/2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake in a 375°F oven for about 10 minutes or until edges are firm.
8. Cool on the cookie sheet for 1 minute. Remove cookies and cool on a wire rack.
9. Store in an airtight container or plastic bag at room temperature for up to 3 days. Makes 36.
